allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\dev\\quant-platform; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Exclude node_modules,dist,.next,pnpm-lock.yaml | Where-Object { -not $_.FullName.Contains\('\\node_modules\\'\) -and -not $_.FullName.Contains\('\\.pnpm\\'\) } | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\('C:\\dev\\quant-platform\\', ''\) } | Sort-Object)
